title: Lootrmon: Lootr & Cobblemon Gilded Chest Compatibility
description: Lootrmon: Lootr & Cobblemon Compatibility for Gilded Chests
body:
This mod requires [Lootr (available for NeoForge and Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr)

Lootrmon is required on both servers and clients.

Lootrmon transforms the way you experience loot in Minecraft when playing with Cobblemon & Lootr! Gilded chests are converted into gilded loot chests, with a unique appearance when the gilded chest has previously been opened. 

Personalized loot: Each player sees unique loot, generated specifically for them.
Near-universal: Compatible with almost every feature and structure, Vanilla or modded.
Faithful to Vanilla: Utilizes the exact same loot generation code as Vanilla.
Server-friendly: Reduces server sizes by removing the need to constantly explore for new structures.
Extremely customizable: There are a ton of features that you can read about in the FAQ.
Patreon & Discord

You can support me on [Patreon](https://patreon.com/noobanidus)!
All support for this mod is available on my [Discord](https://noobanidus.com/discord). You can also keep up with what I'm doing and get notifications streams! For all other support, please click on "Issues" at the top of this page.
